heroText.title: nnovative esign LAB
heroText.slogan1: A multidisciplinary research lab integrating optimization and deep learning for innovative design.
heroText.slogan2: Welcome to ID LAB and join us!
heroText.chochun: Cho Chun Shik Graduate School of Mobility

researchIntro.esDesc: ESO studies optimization of wireless power transfer and electromagnetic devices, including coil geometry, resonant networks, mutual inductance estimation, and robust fault detection for efficient multi-receiver systems.
researchIntro.msDesc: MSO develops optimization models and algorithms for mobility and logistics networks, including vehicle routing, shortest-path search, loop-wise route representation, and real-time decision support for autonomous transportation.
researchIntro.bsDesc: BSO combines topology optimization, finite element analysis, and deep learning to reconstruct trabecular bone microstructures, assess bone quality, and develop patient-specific biomechanical analysis methods.

esPoints: Wireless power transfer coil and resonant network optimization
Mutual inductance estimation, misalignment detection, and multi-receiver system design
msPoints: Vehicle routing, shortest-path, and loop-wise route optimization
Real-time decision support and network modeling for autonomous mobility
bsPoints: Trabecular bone reconstruction with topology optimization and deep learning
Finite element and physics-informed analysis for bone quality assessment
